  • Module
  • Package
  • Class
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AnimatorAdapter
Default no-op adapter for IAnimator.
AnswerValidator
Validates the player's answer using an exact string comparison.
AppInitializer
Handles the initial setup of the application.
AshFX
Particle emitter that spawns floating ash particles rising from the bottom of the screen.
AshParticle
A particle that floats upward and fades out, used for the ash effect in higher difficulty tiers.
AudioClips
Constants for all audio file names used in the game.
AudioManager
Singleton manager for playing background music and sound effects.
BackgroundGradient
Animates the background gradient of a pane based on the current difficulty tier.
ConfettiFX
Particle emitter that fires confetti from the left and right edges of the screen.
ConfettiParticle
A confetti particle that launches upward, rotates, and falls under gravity.
FadeInAnimation
Fades a JavaFX node from fully transparent to fully opaque.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen.
GameLogic
Core game logic.
GameTimer
Countdown timer backed by a JavaFX Timeline.
GameView
Manages all visual output for the main game screen.
IAnimator
Contract for a reusable, single-method UI animation.
IParticle
Contract for a single particle in a particle system.
IParticleEmitter
Contract for a particle emitter that spawns and manages particles on a pane.
ITimer
Contract for a countdown timer used during gameplay.
IValidator
Contract for answer validation.
LevelConfig
Configuration constants and utility methods for game levels.
LevelConfig.Tier
Difficulty tiers used to select word sets and apply visual effects.
LoseController
Controller for the lose screen.
LoseView
Sets up and animates the loose screen.
Main
Entry point of the JustType application.
MenuController
Controller for the main menu screen.
MenuView
Manages the visual state of the main menu screen.
MenuView.MenuSelection
Enum representing the available menu options.
OvershootAnimation
Produces a bouncy pop effect by scaling a node to an overshoot value, then slightly below normal, then settling back to 1.0.
ParticleAdapter
Default adapter for IParticle.
ParticleEmitterAdapter
Default no-op adapter for IParticleEmitter.
PressAnimation
Simulates a physical press by scaling a node down, then releasing it back to full size.
SceneManager
Singleton that manages scene transitions on the primary Stage.
ShakeAnimation
Shakes a node horizontally to signal an incorrect answer.
SlideInAnimation
Slides a node in from a vertical offset, overshoots slightly, then settles at Y=0.
Theme
Central color palette and hex-conversion utility for the application's visual theme.
TimerAdapter
Default no-op adapter for ITimer.
TimerArc
Renders a circular arc indicator that shrinks as the countdown timer decreases.
ValidatorAdapter
Default no-op adapter for IValidator.
WinController
Controller for the win screen.
WinView
Sets up and animates the win screen.
WordBank
Provides words for each difficulty tier.
WordSplitter
Splits a word string into a character array for per-character rendering.
WordTransformer
Applies casing transformations to words for the EXPERT tier.
